title: Choose which Excel sheet to import or import multiple at once
excerpt:
Hey fellas, 
Monday currently doesn’t support importing specific sheets or multiple at once. 
Seems like a good opportunity for improvement so upvote this if you agree! 
Also enabling excel import automations e.g. recurr…

posts.author: oliverjoonatan (Oliver Hotakainen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey fellas,
Monday currently doesn’t support importing specific sheets or multiple at once.
Seems like a good opportunity for improvement so upvote this if you agree!

Also enabling excel import automations e.g. recurring excel import monthly etc.

posts.author: BatisM2 (Maidelis Batista Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Oliver,
Thanks for this feature request!
We also had an issue when importing an Excel file with two sheets while importing the second sheet. We want to be able to select the specific sheet we want to import without making any changes to the Excel file before importing.

posts.author: oliverjoonatan (Oliver Hotakainen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes exactly. Hopefully might see a change in this soon.
